prompt: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo in a polished editorial style, vertical portrait orientation, showing a beautiful young adult woman walking confidently toward the camera in the middle of a modern financial district at sunset. She is centered full-body, photographed at street level with cinematic depth of field, framed by tall glass office towers on both sides reflecting warm golden evening light. The mood is elegant, urban, powerful, and refined, like an upscale fashion magazine cover about after-work style. The woman has long dark hair styled in a thick side braid over one shoulder, a slim sophisticated silhouette, and a poised runway-like stride. She wears a fitted ribbed turtleneck sweater in {argument name="top color" default="burnt orange"} with decorative gold buttons on one shoulder, a high-waisted pencil skirt in {argument name="skirt color" default="warm brown"}, a black belt with a gold buckle, and carries a structured black handbag in one hand. Her expression should feel calm, self-assured, and graceful. Use flattering soft golden-hour lighting, realistic skin and fabric textures, crisp fashion-photography detail on the outfit, and slightly blurred businesspeople in the background walking through the plaza to suggest a busy city evening. The background should include exactly 4 distant office workers, softly out of focus, spread across the walkway. Add realistic magazine cover typography integrated over the image: a very large elegant serif masthead on the upper left reading {argument name="magazine title" default="CITY POISE"}; beneath it on the left, the cover lines "AFTER-WORK STYLE THAT COMMANDS THE EVENING", "MODERN ELEGANCE", "Polished looks for the office and beyond.", "WORK. WALK. WIND DOWN.", "Versatile pieces that move with your day.", "THE POWER OF NEUTRALS", and "Warm tones, clean lines, Quiet confidence."; on the upper right, small text "STYLE & CULTURE" and "MAY 2024"; below that on the right, the teaser "Sunset meetings and city lights. Your best look starts here."; in the lower right, the cover line "EVENING ELEVATED" with the smaller text "From desk to dinner plans— effortless style that transitions beautifully."; and a realistic barcode box at the bottom right with "MAY 2024", US and CAN prices, small issue numbers, and barcode lines. Make the overall composition clean, premium, balanced, and convincingly like a real contemporary fashion magazine cover.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张精致编辑风格的高级时尚杂志封面照片，采用竖向肖像构图，展现一位美丽的年轻女性在日落时分自信地走向镜头，背景是现代金融区。她处于画面中心，全身出镜，以街头视角拍摄，具有电影般的景深效果，两侧高耸的玻璃办公大楼反射着温暖的金色夕阳。整体氛围优雅、都市、充满力量且精致，如同关于下班后风格的高端时尚杂志封面。这位女性留着深色长发，梳成厚实的侧边麻花辫，身形苗条干练，步伐从容如走秀。她身穿一件 {argument name="top color" default="焦橙色"} 的修身罗纹高领毛衣，一侧肩部带有装饰性金色纽扣，搭配一条 {argument name="skirt color" default="暖棕色"} 的高腰铅笔裙，系着黑色金扣腰带，手提一个结构感十足的黑色手袋。她的表情应显得冷静、自信且优雅。使用柔和的黄金时刻光线，呈现真实的皮肤和织物纹理，服装细节具备清晰的时尚摄影质感，背景中略微模糊的商务人士穿梭在广场上，营造出繁忙的城市夜晚氛围。背景应包含 4 位远处的办公人员，焦点柔和，分布在步道上。在图像上添加写实的杂志封面排版：左上角放置一个非常醒目且优雅的衬线字体刊头，文字为 {argument name="magazine title" default="CITY POISE"}；其下方左侧为封面标题：“AFTER-WORK STYLE THAT COMMANDS THE EVENING”（掌控夜晚的下班后风格）、“MODERN ELEGANCE”（现代优雅）、“Polished looks for the office and beyond.”（职场内外的精致造型）、“WORK. WALK. WIND DOWN.”（工作、漫步、放松）、“Versatile pieces that move with your day.”（随心而动的百搭单品）、“THE POWER OF NEUTRALS”（中性色的力量）以及“Warm tones, clean lines, Quiet confidence.”（暖色调，利落线条，静谧自信）；右上角为小字“STYLE & CULTURE”（风格与文化）和“MAY 2024”（2024 年 5 月）；其下方右侧为预告语：“Sunset meetings and city lights. Your best look starts here.”（夕阳会议与城市灯火，从这里开启你的最佳造型。）；右下角为封面标题“EVENING ELEVATED”（进阶之夜），配以小字“From desk to dinner plans— effortless style that transitions beautifully.”（从办公桌到晚餐约会，轻松转换的完美风格。）；右下角放置一个写实的条形码框，包含“MAY 2024”、美加价格、期号及条形码线条。整体构图应简洁、高级、平衡，并呈现出真实当代时尚杂志封面的质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 优雅都市时尚杂志封面：此提示词可生成一张写实的奢华时尚杂志封面，展现一位时髦女性漫步在夕阳下的商务区，非常适合用于编辑、品牌推广及封面设计构思。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 90；构图: centered, full-body, vertical；风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, premium；要求精确文字；文字是主视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
